revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R country data
  |name=To a country data template
  |from=an alias for that country data template
  |sortkey={{{1|{{#invoke:String|sublength|s={{PAGENAME}}|i=13}}}}}
  |info=See {{nowrap|{{slink|Template:Country showdata#Redirect aliases}}}} for more information.
  |template category=Country data redirects
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R country data
  |name=To a country data template
  |from=an alias for that country data template
  |sortkey={{{1|{{#invoke:String|sublength|s={{PAGENAME}}|i=13}}}}}
  |info=See {{nowrap|{{slink|Template:Country showdata#Redirect aliases}}}} for more information.
  |template category=Country data redirects
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R country data
  |name=To a country data template
  |from=an alias for that country data template
  |sortkey={{{1|{{#invoke:String|sublength|s={{PAGENAME}}|i=13}}}}}
  |info=See {{nowrap|{{slink|Template:Country showdata#Redirect aliases}}}} for more information.
  |template category=Country data redirects
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

  |id=R country data

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R country data |name=To a country data template |from=an alias for that country data template |sortkey={{{1|{{#invoke:String|sublength|s={{PAGENAME}}|i=13}}}}} |info=See {{nowrap|{{slink|Template:Country showdata#Redirect aliases}}}} for more information. |template category=Country data redirects }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R country data |name=To a country data template |from=an alias for that country data template |sortkey={{{1|{{#invoke:String|sublength|s={{PAGENAME}}|i=13}}}}} |info=See {{nowrap|{{slink|Template:Country showdata#Redirect aliases}}}} for more information. |template category=Country data redirects }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{documentation}}
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R country data
  |name=To a country data template
  |from=an alias for that country data template
  |sortkey={{{1|{{#invoke:String|sublength|s={{PAGENAME}}|i=13}}}}}
  |info=See {{nowrap|{{slink|Template:Country showdata#Redirect aliases}}}} for more information.
  |template category=Country data redirects
}}<noinclude>

{{documentation}}

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
